metadata.title: ShipFirst
metadata.description: Where first-time product makers get their first paying customer. Free to list · 15% when you sell.

home.tagline: ShipFirst is for your first sale.
home.taglineSub: Product Hunt is for traction. Indie Hackers is for learning.
home.headline: You built it.
home.body: The marketplace where indie makers land their first paying customer. Free to list — 15% only when you sell.
home.supabaseHint: Connect Supabase to show listed products here.
home.emptyGraduating: No makers are close to graduation yet.
home.graduatingTip: This maker has earned $700+ and is approaching the $1,000 graduation cap.

login.title: Log in
login.setupBody: Supabase is not configured. Copy .env.example to .env.local, add your URL and anon key, then restart the dev server.
login.errorCallback: We couldn't complete the auth link. Please try again.
login.signupConfirm: We sent a confirmation email. Open the link to continue. (For local dev, turn off email confirmation in Supabase.)

maker.title: Maker dashboard
maker.stripeBannerBody: Buyers can't pay until Stripe Connect is linked. You can still list and publish products now.
maker.stripeBannerEnvMissing: Add Stripe keys to .env.local (see .env.example), then redeploy.
maker.stripeConnectError: Could not start Stripe onboarding. Try again.
maker.stripeReturnSuccess: Stripe is connected! Buyers can now pay for your products.
maker.stripeReturnPending: Stripe setup isn't finished yet. Use the button below to continue.
maker.dashboardHint: Your maker hub — products, revenue, and community updates.
maker.productsEmpty: No products yet. Start with a draft — it won't go public until you publish.
maker.newHint: You can save a draft first. Publishing shows your product on the discover page.
maker.revenueHint: Once you've earned $1,000 total, you graduate and can no longer add new listings. Existing ones stay live.
maker.externalRevenueHint: Revenue from outside ShipFirst (other platforms, direct sales). Honor system.
maker.graduationBannerBody: You've earned $1,000+. New listings are paused, but your existing products stay live.
maker.graduatingBannerBody: You're close to the $1,000 cap. New listings may be paused soon.
maker.lsSetupTitle: Set up LemonSqueezy to start selling
maker.lsSetupBody: Add your LemonSqueezy buy URL to a product to activate the buy button with your affiliate link. Enable an open affiliate program (15%+) on your LemonSqueezy account first.
maker.firstSaleBody: Someone believed in what you built. Keep shipping — this is just the beginning.
maker.postPlaceholder: What's new? Ship notes, milestones, shoutouts…

account.title: My purchases
account.subtitle: Products you've bought on ShipFirst.
account.week2Hint: Your purchase history will appear here after buying a product.

purchaseComplete.title: Purchase complete
purchaseComplete.headline: You're in!
purchaseComplete.body: Your purchase is confirmed. Check the link below to get started.

product.commentsEmpty: No comments yet. Be the first.
product.featureRequestPlaceholder: What would make this product better? (3–200 chars)
product.featureRequestLoginPrompt: Log in to request a feature
product.fairDealNote: Cancel & refund terms are shown upfront. No hidden surprises.

profileEdit.title: Edit profile
profileEdit.subtitle: This info appears on your public maker page.
profileEdit.bioPlaceholder: What you're building, your background… (300 chars max)

badges.fairDealTip: Price, cancel URL, and refund policy are shown before purchase
badges.earlyBackerTip: Launch window — support the maker's first sales
badges.revenueTip: This maker has Stripe connected and receives payouts directly
badges.lsTip: Sold via LemonSqueezy. 15% automatically goes to ShipFirst as an affiliate commission.

form.errorFairDeal: Can't publish until Fair Deal requirements are met
form.errorGraduated: You've graduated — new listings are paused.
form.name: Product name *
form.descriptionPlaceholder: What it does, who it's for, why it's worth paying for (80+ chars to publish)
form.trialTermsPlaceholder: When billing starts after trial (50+ chars)
form.fairDealHint: To earn the Fair Deal badge when publishing, cancel URL, refund policy, and price must be clear.
form.fairDealPreviewOk: Ready for Fair Deal when you publish
form.fairDealPreviewFail: Fix these before publishing for Fair Deal
form.fairDealPreviewHint: Live check — updates as you type.
form.refundSupplement: Extra terms (optional · 30+ chars recommended for Fair Deal)
form.subAck: I state that users can cancel their subscription at any time *
form.lsUrlHint: Your LemonSqueezy product page URL. ShipFirst automatically appends its affiliate code to this URL for the buy button.
form.lsUrlSetup: Set! The buy button will use your LemonSqueezy affiliate link.

1.label: 14-day full refund (any reason)
1.body:
If you request a refund within 14 days of purchase, we will refund the full amount for any reason.
Contact support from the email used at checkout.

2.label: 7-day refund if unused
2.body:
Refunds within 7 days are available only if you have not materially used the service.
If significant usage is detected, a refund may be denied.

3.label: No refunds (digital delivery)
3.body:
Due to the nature of digital goods, we generally do not offer refunds after purchase.
Please review features, pricing, and billing terms before buying.

fairDeal.nameShort: Product name must be at least 3 characters
fairDeal.descriptionShort: Description must be at least 80 characters
fairDeal.cancelUrlHttps: Cancel URL must start with https://
fairDeal.refundPolicy: Refund policy needs 100+ chars, or template + 30+ chars extra
fairDeal.subAck: Subscription listings require the cancel-anytime acknowledgment
fairDeal.trialTerms: Trial terms must be at least 50 characters
fairDeal.notPublished: Only published products can earn Fair Deal

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 3 characters
validation.descriptionMin: Description must be at least 80 characters
validation.trialTermsMin: Trial terms must be at least 50 characters
validation.refundCustomMin: Custom refund policy must be at least 100 characters
validation.supplementMin: If you add extra terms, use at least 30 characters
